description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the maven:3.8.5-openjdk-11 Docker image, caches the Maven repository at .m2/repository, and defines MAVEN_CLI_OPTS and MAVEN_OPTS variables as shown. Define two stages, test and deploy. In the test stage add a verify:jdk11 job that runs mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS verify and is excluded from the develop branch. In the deploy stage add a deploy:jdk11 job that runs only on the develop branch, first checks for the presence of ci_settings.xml with a shell if statement, then executes mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS deploy -s ci_settings.xml, and finally triggers a downstream pipeline via curl POST to the GitLab API with the given token and ref develop.
